verses.2: “Can a man be profitable to God?
verses.3: Is it any pleasure to the Almighty that you are righteous?
verses.4: Is it for your piety that he reproves you,
verses.6: For you have taken pledges from your brother for nothing,
verses.7: You haven’t given water to the weary to drink,
verses.8: But as for the mighty man, he had the earth.
verses.9: You have sent widows away empty,
verses.11: or darkness, so that you can not see,
verses.12: “Isn’t God in the heights of heaven?
verses.14: Thick clouds are a covering to him, so that he doesn’t see.
verses.15: Will you keep the old way,
verses.16: who were snatched away before their time,
verses.17: who said to God, ‘Depart from us!’
verses.18: Yet he filled their houses with good things,
verses.19: The righteous see it, and are glad.
verses.20: saying, ‘Surely those who rose up against us are cut off.
verses.21: “Acquaint yourself with him now, and be at peace.
verses.22: Please receive instruction from his mouth,
verses.23: If you return to the Almighty, you will be built up,
verses.24: Lay your treasure in the dust,
verses.25: The Almighty will be your treasure,
verses.26: For then you will delight yourself in the Almighty,
verses.27: You will make your prayer to him, and he will hear you.
verses.28: You will also decree a thing, and it will be established to you.
verses.29: When they cast down, you will say, ‘be lifted up.’
verses.30: He will even deliver him who is not innocent.
